description: REQ-015 requires EditingSessionState transitions: editing -> saving (via beginAutoSave) on pipeline entry, saving -> editing (via onSaveSucceeded) on success, saving -> save-failed (via onSaveFailed) on failure. The pipeline implementation does not perform any state transitions. Neither beginAutoSave, onSaveSucceeded, nor onSaveFailed is called anywhere in the codebase. The EditingState input is read-only and never mutated or transitioned.

evidence.snippet: The function receives EditingState at line 33 but never calls beginAutoSave, onSaveSucceeded, or onSaveFailed. No SavingState is ever constructed.
